title: Vanilla Reworked
description: Just a Simple modpack that Changes and tweaks the vanilla game to make it feel and look more polished. This modpack does not change any Core features or add any new content besides mods that improve the base game!
body:
# What this modpack has to offer


This is a Modpack that aims to improve default Vanilla Minecraft to make the game feel more of a quality of life update and **improves the nature and feel of Minecraft**

This Modpack also adds **new Vanilla Features such as being able to sit on stairs / slabs and 2 players being able to ride horses and much more.**

This Modpack is great to play the game with a fresh feel of the Default Game, **This modpack also adds FPS Mods to increase your performance of the game!** 

This Modpack will **add more sound effects for walking, placing blocks, etc.**

**Note! This Modpack does Change how the World gen works.**


<details>
<summary>Screenshots</summary>


_Most of the world gen is bearly noticable lol_

**As of now the Modpack Version will only be for 1.20.4.**

### Vanilla Reworked 1.0

**_Websites & Resource packs used :_**

Vanilla Tweaks -[https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)

Realistic Grass Color - [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/greeny-grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/greeny-grass)

**All Resource packs were not made by me or owned by me, all Credit to creators.**
